LENGTH: 12 

SOURCE: CMS (HPMS files) 

VALUES: — 

COMMENT: CMS instructed plans to calculate this amount by including the average expected cost-sharing amount 
in dollars that a beneficiary would be expected to pay at a network retail pharmacy for a one-month
